label: Stat
description: Defines a named numeric statistic used across RimWorld - covering pawns, items, buildings, and more. Stats control everything from move speed to market value.

category.label: Category
category.description: StatCategoryDef that groups this stat under a heading in the info card.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# StatWorker subclass that computes this stat's value at runtime.

labelForFullStatList.label: Label (full stat list)
labelForFullStatList.description: Alternate label shown when this stat appears in a full stat listing. Falls back to label when absent.

forInformationOnly.label: For information only
forInformationOnly.description: If true, this stat is displayed for reference only and does not affect gameplay calculations.

offsetLabel.label: Offset label
offsetLabel.description: Label used when this stat appears as an offset modifier. Private in source but loaded from XML.

hideAtValue.label: Hide at value
hideAtValue.description: If the computed stat value equals this number, the stat is hidden from the info card.

alwaysHide.label: Always hide
alwaysHide.description: If true, this stat is never shown in the info card regardless of value or show flags.

showNonAbstract.label: Show non-abstract
showNonAbstract.description: If true, the stat is shown on non-abstract defs even without a stat base entry.

showIfUndefined.label: Show if undefined
showIfUndefined.description: If true, the stat is shown in the info card even when no stat base entry is defined.

showOnPawns.label: Show on pawns
showOnPawns.description: If true, this stat appears in the info card for all pawn types.

showOnHumanlikes.label: Show on humanlikes
showOnHumanlikes.description: If true, this stat appears in the info card for humanlike pawns.

showOnNonWildManHumanlikes.label: Show on non-wildman humanlikes
showOnNonWildManHumanlikes.description: If true, this stat appears for humanlike pawns who are not wild men.

showOnAnimals.label: Show on animals
showOnAnimals.description: If true, this stat appears in the info card for animal pawns.

showOnMechanoids.label: Show on mechanoids
showOnMechanoids.description: If true, this stat appears in the info card for mechanoid pawns.

showOnNonWorkTables.label: Show on non-work-tables
showOnNonWorkTables.description: If true, this stat appears for things that are not work tables.

showOnEntities.label: Show on entities
showOnEntities.description: If true, this stat appears for anomaly entity pawns.

showOnDrones.label: Show on drones
showOnDrones.description: If true, this stat appears for mechanoid drone pawns.

showOnNonPowerPlants.label: Show on non-power-plants
showOnNonPowerPlants.description: If true, this stat appears for buildings that are not power plants.

showOnDefaultValue.label: Show on default value
showOnDefaultValue.description: If true, the stat is shown even when its value equals defaultBaseValue.

showOnUnhaulables.label: Show on unhaulables
showOnUnhaulables.description: If true, this stat appears for things that cannot be hauled.

showOnUntradeables.label: Show on untradeables
showOnUntradeables.description: If true, this stat appears for things that cannot be traded.

showIfModsLoaded.label: Show if mods loaded
showIfModsLoaded.description: Mod package IDs; the stat is shown only when all listed mods are active.

showIfModsLoadedAny.label: Show if any mod loaded
showIfModsLoadedAny.description: Mod package IDs; the stat is shown if at least one of the listed mods is active.

showIfHediffsPresent.label: Show if hediffs present
showIfHediffsPresent.description: HediffDefs that must all be active on the pawn for this stat to be displayed.

neverDisabled.label: Never disabled
neverDisabled.description: If true, the stat is never suppressed even when the pawn lacks the relevant skill.

showZeroBaseValue.label: Show zero base value
showZeroBaseValue.description: If true, the stat is shown even when the thing has no stat base entry (effective zero base).

showOnSlavesOnly.label: Show on slaves only
showOnSlavesOnly.description: If true, this stat is shown only for enslaved pawns.

showOnPlayerMechanoids.label: Show on player mechanoids
showOnPlayerMechanoids.description: If true, this stat is shown for player-controlled mechanoids.

showDevelopmentalStageFilter.label: Show developmental stage filter
showDevelopmentalStageFilter.description: DevelopmentalStage flags (comma-separated) controlling which pawn life stages this stat is shown for.

hideInClassicMode.label: Hide in classic mode
hideInClassicMode.description: If true, this stat is hidden when the game is in classic ideology mode.

showOnPawnKind.label: Show on pawn kind
showOnPawnKind.description: PawnKindDefs that must match the pawn for this stat to be shown.

overridesHideStats.label: Overrides hide stats
overridesHideStats.description: If true, this stat's show rules override any alwaysHide flags set on the def.

displayPriorityInCategory.label: Display priority in category
displayPriorityInCategory.description: Sort order within the stat category. Lower values appear first.

toStringNumberSense.label: Number sense
toStringNumberSense.description: Controls whether the displayed value is treated as absolute, a factor (×), or an offset (±).

toStringStyle.label: String style
toStringStyle.description: Controls how the numeric value is formatted in tooltips and the info card.

toStringStyleUnfinalized.label: String style (unfinalized)
toStringStyleUnfinalized.description: Formatting style used before the stat is finalized (e.g., during construction). Private in source but loaded from XML. When absent, toStringStyle is used.

formatString.label: Format string
formatString.description: Custom C# format string for the stat value. Marked [MustTranslate].

formatStringUnfinalized.label: Format string (unfinalized)
formatStringUnfinalized.description: Format string used when the stat is unfinalized. Marked [MustTranslate].

finalizeEquippedStatOffset.label: Finalize equipped stat offset
finalizeEquippedStatOffset.description: If true, equipped-item stat offsets are applied to the finalized value rather than the pre-finalization base.

statFactorsExplanationHeader.label: Stat factors explanation header
statFactorsExplanationHeader.description: Header label shown above the stat factors section in the detailed explanation tooltip. Marked [MustTranslate].

defaultBaseValue.label: Default base value
defaultBaseValue.description: Value used when no explicit statBases entry is defined for the thing. Defaults to 1.

skillNeedOffsets.label: Skill need offsets
skillNeedOffsets.description: Pawn skill requirements that add an offset to the stat value. Each item may specify a Class for polymorphic evaluation.

noSkillOffset.label: No-skill offset
noSkillOffset.description: Offset applied when the pawn has no relevant skill (skill is null or disabled).

capacityOffsets.label: Capacity offsets
capacityOffsets.description: Pawn capacity modifiers that add an offset to the stat value based on capacity efficiency.

statFactors.label: Stat factors
statFactors.description: Other stats whose values multiply into this stat's computed result.

applyFactorsIfNegative.label: Apply factors if negative
applyFactorsIfNegative.description: If true, stat factors and capacity factors are applied even when the value is negative.

skillNeedFactors.label: Skill need factors
skillNeedFactors.description: Pawn skill requirements that multiply the stat value. Each item may specify a Class for polymorphic evaluation.

noSkillFactor.label: No-skill factor
noSkillFactor.description: Multiplier applied when the pawn has no relevant skill.

capacityFactors.label: Capacity factors
capacityFactors.description: Pawn capacity modifiers that multiply the stat value based on capacity efficiency.

postProcessCurve.label: Post-process curve
postProcessCurve.description: Piecewise linear curve applied to the stat value after all other modifiers are resolved.

postProcessStatFactors.label: Post-process stat factors
postProcessStatFactors.description: Stats whose values multiply the result after the post-process curve is applied.

minValue.label: Min value
minValue.description: Lower bound clamped on the final computed stat value.

maxValue.label: Max value
maxValue.description: Upper bound clamped on the final computed stat value. Defaults to float.MaxValue (uncapped).

valueIfMissing.label: Value if missing
valueIfMissing.description: Value returned when the stat cannot be computed for the request.

roundValue.label: Round value
roundValue.description: If true, the final stat value is rounded to the nearest integer.

roundToFiveOver.label: Round to five over
roundToFiveOver.description: When the stat value exceeds this threshold, it is rounded to the nearest five.

minifiedThingInherits.label: Minified thing inherits
minifiedThingInherits.description: If true, a minified version of a thing inherits this stat from the inner thing.

supressDisabledError.label: Suppress disabled error
supressDisabledError.description: If true, no config error is raised when this stat is disabled. Note: the field name is intentionally misspelled to match the source.

cacheable.label: Cacheable
cacheable.description: If true, the computed stat value is cached per-request to avoid redundant recalculation.

displayMaxWhenAboveOrEqual.label: Display max when above or equal
displayMaxWhenAboveOrEqual.description: If true, the display shows a maximum symbol instead of the numeric value when the stat is at or above its max.

scenarioRandomizable.label: Scenario randomizable
scenarioRandomizable.description: If true, the scenario editor can randomize this stat's base value.

disableIfSkillDisabled.label: Disable if skill disabled
disableIfSkillDisabled.description: SkillDef; this stat is disabled for pawns who cannot use the specified skill.

parts.label: Parts
parts.description: Polymorphic list of StatPart objects that modify the computed stat value. Each item specifies a Class attribute.
